_note: Content block for /solutions/sell-on-ai. Use-case page for the store MCP server (PRs #743–#761): every partner storefront is agent-addressable, so an AI agent can discover a store, search the catalogue, build a cart, onboard the shopper, and take payment end-to-end. Accurate to the shipped tools — no overclaiming.

hero.title: Your store, addressable by agents.
hero.subtitle: Every storefront ships with a Model Context Protocol server. An AI agent can discover your store, search the catalogue, build a cart, onboard the shopper, and take payment — PayU for INR, Stripe for the rest.

shift.title: Buying is moving into the chat.
shift.body: Shoppers are increasingly buying inside AI clients — Claude, Cursor, assistants yet to ship. Most stores can't be reached there at all. JYT exposes your catalogue and checkout as MCP tools, so an agent can complete a real purchase (cart, customer, payment, order) without you building a single integration.

steps.title: An agent checkout, end to end.

items.title: Discover your store
items.body: An agent calls list_stores and resolves yours by name, domain, or handle — no API keys to hand-hold. The platform's core store is the default.

items.title: Search and add to cart
items.body: semantic_search takes natural language (‘handwoven indigo scarf’) and returns ranked matches. The agent creates a cart and adds the line item in two tool calls.

items.title: Onboard the shopper
items.body: set_customer_details asks the user for name, email, and address, then reports what's missing. One-step onboarding, inside the conversation.

items.title: Take payment, confirm the order
items.body: The agent initialises a payment session — a PayU link or UPI QR for INR, a Stripe hosted page elsewhere — then polls until the cart becomes an order.

items.title: No integration to build
items.body: The MCP server is part of the platform. Onboard as a partner and your storefront is agent-addressable from day one — read tools open, write tools gated behind a publishable key.

items.title: Real checkout, not a link out
items.body: Agents drive the full cart→payment→order flow with PayU INR (link, UPI intent, QR) and Stripe hosted checkout — Apple/Google Pay included.

items.title: Provenance travels with it
items.body: Custom tools expose raw materials and the production story, so an agent can answer ‘who made this?’ with the passport, not a guess.

items.title: Multi-tenant by design
items.body: Agents address stores by name across the network. Your storefront, the core store, and every partner sit on the same agent-ready rail.

cta.title: Put your store where the agents are.
cta.body: We’ll connect an agent to a demo storefront and walk it through a full purchase — search, cart, payment, order — live.
